title: Measurement Distribution
description: Histogram and SPC statistics (Cpk, Cp) for a selected measurement

list.name: measurement
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name AS m FROM measurement_values WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m

targets.rawSql: SELECT value FROM measurement_values WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}'

SELECT round(avg(value), 4) AS mean, round(stddev(value), 4) AS sigma, round(min(value), 4) AS min_val, round(max(value), 4) AS max_val, count(*) AS n, round(first(limit_low), 4) AS lsl, round(first(limit_high), 4) AS usl, round(first(nominal), 4) AS nominal, CASE WHEN stddev(value) > 0 AND first(limit_high) IS NOT NULL AND first(limit_low) IS NOT NULL THEN round((first(limit_high) - first(limit_low)) / (6 * stddev(value)), 2) END AS cp, CASE WHEN stddev(value) > 0 AND first(limit_high) IS NOT NULL AND first(limit_low) IS NOT NULL THEN round(least((first(limit_high) - avg(value)) / (3 * stddev(value)), (avg(value) - first(limit_low)) / (3 * stddev(value))), 2) END AS cpk FROM measurement_values WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND value IS NOT NULL AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}'

SELECT outcome, count(*) AS cnt FROM measurement_values WHERE step_name || ' / ' || measurement_name = '${measurement}' AND measurement_timestamp BETWEEN '${__from:date}' AND '${__to:date}' GROUP BY outcome
